positive: A majestic symmetrical composition featuring bioluminescent woodland spirits integrated with celestial astronomical elements. The main subject is a central, stylized circular Mandala design formed by intertwined glowing flora (like luminous lotus blossoms and fern fronds) cradling a stylized crescent moon and a cluster of nebulous stars. Use deep jewel tones (indigo, emerald, sapphire) contrasted by vivid neon teal and ethereal gold luminescence. The style should be intricate Art Nouveau mixed with detailed psychedelic illustration, emphasizing crisp, clean silhouettes and strong, dramatic contrast against a midnight blue background. The art must be perfectly suited for screen-printing on apparel, maintaining clear lines and high visual impact. Highly detailed, symmetrical, central composition.
negative: blur, grainy, low resolution, noise, smudge, watermark, signature, text, dirty, amateur, cropped, bad anatomy, extra limbs, asymmetrical, simple, boring, sketch, photorealistic
